name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie flat on bench with feet planted. Grip bar slightly wider than shoulder width. Unrack and lower to mid-chest. Press up to lockout.
form_cues: Keep shoulder blades retracted and depressed. Don't flare elbows past 45 degrees. Drive feet into floor.

name: Barbell Back Squat
instructions: Position bar on upper traps. Unrack and step back. Break at hips and knees simultaneously. Descend until hip crease is below knee.
form_cues: Keep chest up and core braced. Push knees out over toes. Don't let knees cave inward.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Hang from bar with overhand grip slightly wider than shoulders. Pull up until chin clears bar. Lower with control.
form_cues: Initiate with scapular depression. Avoid kipping or swinging. Full range of motion.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold barbell at hip height. Hinge at hips pushing them back. Keep slight knee bend. Lower until hamstrings are stretched.
form_cues: Keep bar close to legs. Maintain neutral spine throughout. Squeeze glutes at top.

name: Plank
instructions: Start in push-up position on forearms. Keep body in straight line from head to heels. Hold for prescribed time.
form_cues: Don't let hips sag or pike up. Brace core as if about to be punched. Breathe steadily.
